description: Use this API to return real machine quantities. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, rval = macdat(ibus, id, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the machine quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Maximum generator reactive output in Mvar.
Same as ‘QMAX’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Minimum generator reactive output in Mvar.
Same as ‘QMIN’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Maximum generator active output in MW.
Same as ‘PMAX’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Minimum generator real active in MW.
Same as ‘PMIN’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Total MVA base.
Machine loading in MVA.
Same as ‘MVA’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Machine loading in MW.
Same as ‘P’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
Machine loading in Mvar.
Same as ‘Q’ in units determined by the power output option setting.
MVA loading of the machines as a percentage of machine base.
Step-up transformer off-nominal turns ratio.
Regulated voltage setpoint.
‘WPF Power factor used in setting reactive power limits for this wind machine when WMOD is 2 or 3.
Fraction of total ownership assigned to the first owner.
Fraction of total ownership assigned to the second owner.
Fraction of total ownership assigned to the third owner.
Fraction of total ownership assigned to the fourth owner.
Percentage of total MVAR required to regulate remote bus voltage.
Positive sequence fault analysis machine resistance.
Positive sequence fault analysis machine subtransient reactance.
Positive sequence fault analysis machine transient reactance.
Positive sequence fault analysis machine synchronous reactance.
Non-conventional source per unit maximum total fault current magnitude.
Non-conventional source per unit dead-band minimum voltage.
Non-conventional source per unit dead-band maximum voltage.

error_codes.description: Bus type code is not 2 or 3; ‘RVAL’ returned.
For STRING = ‘FRACTn’, n > number of owners; ‘RVAL’ unchanged.
For STRING = ‘WPF’, this machine is not a wind machine; ‘RVAL’ of 1.0 returned.
Sequence data not in case for STRING = ‘RPOS’, ‘XSUBTR’, ‘XTRANS’, ‘XSYNCH’, ‘IFMAX’, ‘DBVMIN’ or ‘DBVMAX’; ‘RVAL’ unchanged.
No non-conventional source data for this maxhine for STRING = ‘IFMAX’, ‘DBVMIN’ or ‘DBVMAX’; ‘RVAL’ unchanged.
